message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="green" summary="+1 on step 11 wording and bundled commit">
That wording is good. Clear, concise, and actionable. +1.

Bundling the CI YAML change and the TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md step 11 clarification in the same commit also makes sense — they are one logical change (adjusting CI filtering and updating the process to match).
</teammate-message>

input.content: Thanks Kent. Both changes are already committed and pushed — CI passed green. I've initiated the mini-retro. Any process observations from your side?
